title: Sri Chaitanya is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Sri Chaitanya is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Sri Chaitanya family as a Subject Matter Expert in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Sri Chaitanya:
Sri Chaitanya is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya!
